#+TITLE: vendor/bindings/tinyfd.til

* tinyfd_messageBox
#+begin_src til
ext_proc tinyfd_messageBox(aTitle: I8, aMessage: I8, aDialogType: I8, aIconType: I8, shallow aDefaultButton: I32) returns shallow I32
#+end_src

* tinyfd_inputBox
#+begin_src til
ext_proc tinyfd_inputBox(aTitle: I8, aMessage: I8, aDefaultInput: I8) returns ref I8
#+end_src

* tinyfd_saveFileDialog
#+begin_src til
ext_proc tinyfd_saveFileDialog(aTitle: I8, aDefaultPathAndFile: I8, shallow aNumOfFilterPatterns: I32, aFilterPatterns: Dynamic, aSingleFilterDescription: I8) returns ref I8
#+end_src

* tinyfd_openFileDialog
#+begin_src til
ext_proc tinyfd_openFileDialog(aTitle: I8, aDefaultPathAndFile: I8, shallow aNumOfFilterPatterns: I32, aFilterPatterns: Dynamic, aSingleFilterDescription: I8, shallow aAllowMultipleSelects: I32) returns ref I8
#+end_src

* tinyfd_selectFolderDialog
#+begin_src til
ext_proc tinyfd_selectFolderDialog(aTitle: I8, aDefaultPath: I8) returns ref I8
#+end_src

* tinyfd_colorChooser
#+begin_src til
ext_proc tinyfd_colorChooser(aTitle: I8, aDefaultHexRGB: I8, aDefaultRGB: U8, mut aoResultRGB: U8) returns ref I8
#+end_src
